steps.title: Use the percent-of-100 shortcut
steps.content: When the number is $100$, a percent of it is especially fast: $23\%$ of $100$ is just $23$.

steps.title: Check with multiplication
steps.content: The formal calculation gives the same result: $$23\%=\frac{23}{100}$$ $$\frac{23}{100}\cdot 100=23$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $23$, is $23\%$ of $100$. Correct.
  • Choice B, $46$, would be $46\%$ of $100$.
  • Choice C, $77$, is $23\%$ less than $100$, not $23\%$ of $100$.
  • Choice D, $123$, is $23\%$ greater than $100$, not $23\%$ of $100$.
That is the correct answer.
